mapper.sql: id, order_id, order_no, supplier_id, product_id, product_name, product_image, category, material, color, size, model, price, quantity, amount, support_installation, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO client_order_items (order_id, order_no, supplier_id, product_id, product_name, product_image, category, material, color, size, model, price, quantity, amount, support_installation, created_at) VALUES (#{orderId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orderNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{supplierId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{productId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{productName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{productImage, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{category, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{material, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{color, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{size, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{model, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{price, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{quantity, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{amount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{supportInstallation, jdbcType=BOOLEAN}, #{createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

INSERT INTO client_order_items (order_id, order_no, supplier_id, product_id, product_name, product_image, category, material, color, size, model, price, quantity, amount, support_installation, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.orderId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.orderNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.supplierId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.productId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.productName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.productImage, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.category, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.material, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.color, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.size, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.model, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.price, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.quantity, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.amount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.supportInstallation, jdbcType=BOOLEAN}, #{item.createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM client_order_items WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
SELECT FROM client_order_items WHERE order_id = #{orderId, jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT FROM client_order_items WHERE order_no = #{orderNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM client_order_items WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
DELETE FROM client_order_items WHERE id IN #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
